title: croton wellensii
intro: Croton wellensii, also known as the 'Prairie Fire' or 'Lemon Croton', is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton wellensii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases such as diabetes and cancer. Herbal preparations of Croton wellensii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a variety of health issues due to its medicinal properties.
